title: Free Fire Panel App

requirements.text: Rebuild the application as a Free Fire game panel app. Replace all existing hacker/terminal theme content with a Free Fire-themed interface. The app should feel like an in-game companion panel for Free Fire players.
acceptanceCriteria: App title and branding reference Free Fire
All hacker/matrix/terminal aesthetic is replaced with a Free Fire game UI aesthetic (dark military/battle royale style with orange/red/gold accent colors)
Navigation tabs reflect Free Fire panel sections

requirements.text: Create a Dashboard/Home page showing a Free Fire player stats overview: player nickname, UID, level, rank badge, K/D ratio, win rate, total matches played, and headshot percentage. Display stats as stylized cards.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard displays player nickname, UID, and level prominently
Rank badge is displayed with appropriate rank name (e.g., Heroic, Grandmaster)
K/D ratio, win rate, total matches, and headshot % are shown as stat cards
Layout is responsive and styled with Free Fire battle-royale aesthetic

requirements.text: Create a Weapons page listing popular Free Fire weapons (e.g., M1014, AK, M82B, Groza, SCAR) with stats bars for damage, range, fire rate, reload speed, and magazine size. Allow filtering by weapon type (AR, SMG, Sniper, Shotgun, Pistol).
acceptanceCriteria: Weapons list shows at least 10 popular Free Fire weapons
Each weapon card displays stat bars for key attributes
Filter buttons allow filtering by weapon category
Active filter is visually highlighted

requirements.text: Create a Characters page listing Free Fire characters (e.g., Alok, Chrono, Dimitri, K, Skyler) with their special abilities, ability descriptions, and ability cooldown/duration stats. Each character card should show name, ability name, and a short description.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 8 Free Fire characters are listed
Each card shows character name, ability name, and description
Cards are displayed in a responsive grid
Page uses consistent Free Fire-themed styling

requirements.text: Create a Match History page showing a list of simulated recent match entries. Each entry should display: map name, placement (e.g., #1 Booyah!, #5), kills, damage dealt, survival time, and match mode (Classic, Clash Squad, Ranked).
acceptanceCriteria: At least 10 recent match entries are shown
Each entry shows placement, kills, damage, survival time, and mode
Booyah (1st place) entries are visually highlighted differently
Entries are listed in reverse chronological order

requirements.text: Create a bottom navigation bar with tabs for: Home (Dashboard), Weapons, Characters, and Matches. The active tab should be visually highlighted with the Free Fire accent color.
acceptanceCriteria: Bottom nav has four tabs: Home, Weapons, Characters, Matches
Active tab is highlighted with accent color
Navigation switches pages without full reload
Nav bar is fixed at the bottom on mobile viewport

requirements.text: Apply a cohesive Free Fire-themed visual design across the entire app: dark background (near-black), orange/amber/gold accent colors, military/tactical typography, subtle fire or energy glow effects on key UI elements, and a header showing the Free Fire Panel logo/title.
acceptanceCriteria: App-wide background is dark (e.g., #0a0a0a or similar near-black)
Primary accent color is orange or amber (not blue/purple)
Header displays app branding clearly
Glow or fire effects are applied to accent elements consistently
Font style feels tactical/military while remaining readable

requirements.text: Clear all backend Motoko actor logic and replace it with a minimal actor that exposes no endpoints, since all data is frontend-only and statically defined.
acceptanceCriteria: backend/main.mo compiles successfully as an empty or minimal actor
No stale endpoints from the previous hacker app remain

constraints: Do not edit files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
All data (player stats, weapons, characters, match history) must be statically defined on the frontend — no backend data storage required
Do not use blue or purple as primary accent colors
nonGoals: Real Free Fire API integration or live player data fetching
In-app purchases or item shop features
Real-time match tracking or game overlay
Cheat tools, aimbots, or any exploit-related features

required: Free Fire panel app logo with flame and crosshair motif on dark background (ff-panel-logo.dim_256x256.png)
Battle royale dark banner with fire and smoke atmospheric effect (ff-header-banner.dim_1200x300.png)
Weapon category icon set: assault rifle, SMG, sniper, shotgun, pistol silhouettes in orange on transparent background (ff-weapon-icons.dim_512x128.png)
